creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Comment on attachment 187721
Proposed patch (since 452422 revision)

Added maintainer-approval request, just in case. But possible to clarify descriptions, if needed (this is why it was for reference).

Overall, this patch may allow to use devel/tig port with correct runtime dependency information, in case of enabled GIT option, while solve issue of this PR, in case of disabled GIT option (by default), e.g. for packages. Still, there may be a case where some user(s) may prefer package with enabled GIT option, this is why devel/tig-plain port was proposed (attachment #173801) instead (from different point of view).
